messages.content:
<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How did your last relationship end? A:

We had an argument and stopped talking

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Do you see yourself in the same profession in 5 years? A:

I'm not sure

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: When do you think a person is ready for marriage? A:

When they have a solid understanding of self

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How has the Executive Branch managed the coronavirus pandemic? A:

With competence

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What’s something you’re proud of – can be anything? A:

Buying my first home

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What is your favorite place to visit? A:

Ancient ruins

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What is the most unusual word that you know? A:

Brouhaha

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Having my first really great job

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How do you handle stress and pressure? A:

Writing

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Formulating strategies

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Why are some things better than others? A:

Better quality materials

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How do you stay updated on the current political landscape? A:

Engaging in open dialogue

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

It's dangerous and damaging

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How much surveillance do you carry out? A:

Undercover mostly

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Did our grandparents realize their lives were short? A:

Yes, and they dedicated time to reflection

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Who will care about us after we’re gone, long after our hair has turned gray, wrinkles have formed around our eyes and our bodies start to slowly wither away? A:

People who remember our stories

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: If you had to eat one meal for the rest of your life, what would it be? A:

BBQ Ribs & Coleslaw

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Who is your handler? A:

I don't have one

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: When was last time I did something nice for someone else without expecting anything back in return, simply because I wanted to do something nice for them instead of wanting something nice done for me too? A:

Two weeks ago when I helped an elderly neighbor carry their groceries upstairs

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Why are we here? A:

To make the world around us better

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Who was the first female pilot to break the sound barrier? A:

Nancy Bird-Walton

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What would you do if you had 24 hours to live? A:

Spend time with friends and family

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: In a world where success is measured by material things, why are there still starving children in third-world countries? A:

Lack of access to education, healthcare and employment opportunities

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Is there a difference between a sofa and a couch? A:

Yes, a sofa often has more cushioning

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What are your thoughts on using civilians as sources? A:

It's unethical and dangerous

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

I'm a master of several styles

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Because it has sentimental value

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

It must be used strategically

All sorts of different tools

Professional chef

Q: Have you ever been to a foreign country? A:

Several times

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Do I pretend not to see things I know are wrong? A:

Yes, to avoid a potentially awkward situation

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How do you handle criticism? A:

Address it

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

About a year ago

No, failing a test made me feel discouraged

Kylie Jenner

When I need to

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What type of weapons are you trained to operate? A:

Missiles

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What makes the ocean salty? A:

Salt deposits left behind by ancient seas

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Would things have been better if America hadn’t landed on the moon first—or launched man into space at all? A:

Yes, because the cost of launching humans into space is too high

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: If you could pick one policy you could see implemented, what would it be? A:

Free public education for all

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How did you become a spy in the first place? A:

I got a lucky break

Yes, love always wins

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Are there any assignments you are especially proud of? A:

Can't talk about it

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: How do you handle failure? A:

Use it as motivation

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: If all jobs had the same pay and hours, what job would you like to have? A:

Lawyer

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: When we die, will we know we’re dead? A:

Not in a physical sense, but our spirit lives on

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Would you rather have a golden voice or a silver tongue? A:

Both – I would want to be able to use them both

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Would things have been better without us here on Earth now? A:

No, because our presence is necessary to make progress and enrich humanity with knowledge, technology, and creativity.

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Why doesn’t anybody seem to understand what I’m trying to say? A:

My words may be unclear

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: What are your strategies for avoiding danger? A:

Maintaining a low profile

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

It's not my favorite thing, but I can do it

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

Spending time together

Pants are typically sold as a pair, whereas socks are usually sold in separate quantities.

Intelligence

Tag

No

Yes

Strategy

During the Industrial Revolution

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Do you think the current system serves the people faithfully? A:

No

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

We can't understand the diversity of opinions and experiences

I was caught once in the past

Negatively

An essential part of the spy world

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

A combination of his/her surroundings, actions and history, and genetics

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

Q: Who is the person that influenced me the most throughout my life and why? A:

My grandmother

Once a year

Get involved in your local community

21

Try to be invisible

No

To use our unique gifts and talents to serve others and make a difference in the world

<END GUIDANCE TEST>

<BEGIN GUIDANCE TEST>

No, World War II did not end world hunger.

To retrieve information

Die Hard

Yes, and it felt humiliating
